load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.title: Load PDF and Retrieve XMP Metadata
load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract its XMP metadata as a byte array.

check-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.title: Check for XMP Metadata in a PDF
check-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to detect whether a PDF file contains XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades before attempting any modifications.

set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind an XMP metadata facade to a PDF document and set the BaseURL property, then save the updated PDF.

set-xmp-creatortool-property.title: Set XMP CreatorTool Property in PDF
set-xmp-creatortool-property.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add or replace the XMP CreatorTool metadata property with the current application version, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-xmp-nickname.title: Set PDF XMP Nickname Property
set-pdf-xmp-nickname.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add a custom Nickname to its XMP metadata, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-nickname-from-xmp-metadata.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata
remove-nickname-from-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the XMP metadata facade, delete the Nickname property, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, retrieve the raw XMP XML as a UTF‑8 string, and save it to a file.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract its XMP metadata as XML, and parse specific schema properties such as creator, creation date, and PDF/A part.

modify-xmp-metadata-node.title: Modify XMP Metadata Node in PDF
modify-xmp-metadata-node.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF, edit a specific node using XML and XPath, and write the updated metadata back to the document with Aspose.Pdf.

update-multiple-xmp-properties.title: Update Multiple XMP Properties in a PDF Atomically
update-multiple-xmp-properties.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, add or update several standard and custom XMP metadata properties, and save the changes in a single atomic operation.

update-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata and Save
update-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, modify its XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the updated document.

insert-page-update-xmp-metadata.title: Insert Page and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
insert-page-update-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to add a blank page to an existing PDF and modify its XMP metadata, including standard and custom properties, before saving.

preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF Pages
preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.description: Shows how to extract the original XMP metadata from a multi‑page PDF, split the document into single‑page PDFs, and re‑apply the metadata to each new file using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.title: Copy XMP Metadata Between PDFs and Merge
copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF, apply it to a target PDF, and then concatenate the PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

export-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
export-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with the PdfXmpMetadata facade, extract its XMP metadata, and save it as a separate .xmp side‑car file.

replace-pdf-xmp-metadata-from-external-f.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
replace-pdf-xmp-metadata-from-external-f.description: Demonstrates how to import an external .xmp file and replace the existing XMP metadata block in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the Facades API.

validate-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Validate PDF XMP Metadata Against XSD Schema
validate-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and validate it against an official XMP XSD schema with an XML schema validator.

update-pdf-xmp-metadata-with-warnings.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata with Warning for Existing Values
update-pdf-xmp-metadata-with-warnings.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, inspect XMP metadata properties, log a warning when a property already contains a non‑empty value, and set new values only when appropriate.

log-modify-xmp-metadata-size.title: Log and Modify XMP Metadata Size in PDF
log-modify-xmp-metadata-size.description: Demonstrates how to read the XMP metadata from a PDF, log its byte size before and after modification, add a new creator entry, and save the updated document.

extract-audit-original-xmp-metadata.title: Extract and Audit Original XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-audit-original-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, retrieve its XMP metadata packet using Aspose.Pdf, and save the original XML to an audit file for traceability.

add-creator-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF Document
add-creator-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a reusable extension method that sets the Creator field in a PDF's metadata using Aspose.Pdf's DocumentInfo and saves the document.

clear-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF while Preserving Header
clear-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all XMP metadata from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving only the required PDF schema header, and save the cleaned file.

remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the cleaned file.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-error-handlin.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Error Handling using PdfFileSecurity
decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-error-handlin.description: Demonstrates binding an encrypted PDF with PdfFileSecurity, handling InvalidPasswordException by reopening the document with a password, and then decrypting and saving the PDF.

decrypt-update-creator-metadata-reencryp.title: Decrypt PDF, Update Creator Metadata, and Re‑Encrypt
decrypt-update-creator-metadata-reencryp.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, removing its encryption, modifying the Creator metadata field, and applying new AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions.

write-read-custom-pdf-metadata.title: Write and Read Custom PDF Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
write-read-custom-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add custom XMP metadata (BaseUrl, CreatorTool, Nickname) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then read it back to verify the values.

verify-htmlloadoptions-basepath-escaping.title: Verify HtmlLoadOptions BasePath Escaping with Special Characters
verify-htmlloadoptions-basepath-escaping.description: Demonstrates a unit test that ensures the BasePath supplied to HtmlLoadOptions is preserved and correctly escaped when it contains spaces and special characters, and that the resulting PDF can be processed with a Facade.

benchmark-xmp-metadata-extraction.title: Benchmark XMP Metadata Extraction from Large PDF
benchmark-xmp-metadata-extraction.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a large PDF and measure the elapsed time using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata in a Folder
update-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑update the Creator metadata property of all PDF files in a specified directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The utility reads each PDF, sets a new Creator value, and saves the changes.

update-xmp-property-in-pdf.title: Update XMP Property in PDF
update-xmp-property-in-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add or update an XMP metadata property, and save the modified file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-xmp-baseurl-in-pdf.title: Update XMP BaseURL in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
update-xmp-baseurl-in-pdf.description: Shows how to set the XMP BaseURL property of a PDF to a supplied host URL and save the updated document.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.description: Shows how to open a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load XMP metadata from a PDF, extract unique namespace prefixes from the metadata keys, and retrieve their corresponding namespace URIs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing
add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to detect the absence of XMP metadata in a PDF and add a minimal set (title and creator) using the PdfXmpMetadata facade, then save the updated document.

export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata, convert the XML into a JSON-friendly object graph, and save the result as a JSON file.

compress-pdf-high-compression-read-xmp-m.title: Compress PDF with High Settings and Read XMP Metadata
compress-pdf-high-compression-read-xmp-m.description: The example loads a PDF, applies aggressive optimization options to achieve high compression, saves the result, and then reads the XMP metadata from the compressed file using the PdfXmpMetadata facade.

validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to check for required XMP metadata fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the document only when all mandatory fields are present.

add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, inserting text, binding the XMP metadata facade, adding a custom ISO‑8601 timestamp property, and saving the document with platform‑specific handling.

extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and return it as a case‑insensitive dictionary of string key/value pairs.

set-default-creatortool-metadata-pdf.title: Set Default CreatorTool Metadata in PDF
set-default-creatortool-metadata-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to check the Creator metadata of a PDF and assign a default value from configuration when it is missing, using Aspose.Pdf.

disable-baseurl-injection-for-pdf-genera.title: Disable BaseUrl Injection for PDF Generation in Test Environments
disable-baseurl-injection-for-pdf-genera.description: Demonstrates using an environment variable to toggle BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf by selecting appropriate HtmlLoadOptions.
